name: tei
description: Inspect and query a Text Embeddings Inference server through its HTTP API.

tei_url.title: TEI URL
tei_url.description: Base URL of the Text Embeddings Inference server, including scheme and port. Do not include a trailing slash.

tei_auth_header.title: Auth Header
tei_auth_header.description: Optional full HTTP auth header for protected deployments, for example: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Leave blank for trusted local deployments.
